content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你将听到两名学生，Shona和Peter，讨论他们的实习选择。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear two students, called Shona, and Peter, discussing their internship options.

content.cn_text: 首先，你将有一些时间查看问题21至25。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions, 21 to 25.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细聆听，并回答问题21至25。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully, and answer questions 21 to 25.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 嗨，肖娜。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Hi, Shona.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 嗨，彼得。你决定申请哪个实习项目了吗？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Hi, Peter. Have you made up your mind about which internship program to apply for?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 嗯，差不多了。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Yes, pretty much.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 我完全不知道怎么办。我是说，有那么多好的。你能给我一些建议吗？
content.en_text: [Shona]: I'm entirely at a loss. I mean, there are so many good ones. Can you give me some tips?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 当然。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Sure.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 你在权衡这些项目时，最优先考虑的是什么？
content.en_text: [Shona]: What is your top priority when weighing up these programs?

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 嗯，我想我会选择那些能帮助我弥补未来职业所需技能的。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Well, I guess I'd go for ones that can help me with the skill set I lack for my future career.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我仍然需要大量处理统计数据的实践培训。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I still need a lot of practical training in dealing with statistics.

content.cn_text: 但请记住，你不想把目标定得太宏伟，比如制定商业计划。你可能会一无所获。
content.en_text: But keep in mind that you don't want to set your goal to grand, like drawing up a business plan. You might end up nowhere.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 我明白了。所以我想学习如何组织想法并展示它们。
content.en_text: [Shona]: I see. So I want to learn how to organize ideas and present them.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 很好。现在你已经完成了第一步。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Good. Now you've nailed step one.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 接下来呢？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Now what?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 你还必须考虑你的优势，以找到合适的实习项目。
content.en_text: [Peter]: You must also consider your strengths for a suitable internship program.

content.cn_text: 否则，你可能会被拒绝，或者最终找到一个你无法胜任的工作。
content.en_text: Otherwise, you might get rejected, or end up with one that you are incapable of doing.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 但我不知道自己擅长什么。
content.en_text: [Shona]: But I have no idea what I'm good at.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 和你周围的人，或者和你一起工作过的人交流。我就是这么做的。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Communicate with people around you, or whom you've worked with. That's what I did.

content.cn_text: 我以为我是一个好的团队领导，但我合作过的许多人都提到了别的事情。
content.en_text: I thought I was a good team leader, but many people I've worked with for various projects mentioned something else.

content.cn_text: 他们很欣赏我能日以继夜地工作，按时完成项目。
content.en_text: They admire that I could work around the clock to finish projects on time.

content.cn_text: 事实上，当我时间紧迫时，我更专注，表现也更好。
content.en_text: And indeed, I'm more focused and perform better when I'm pushed for time.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 说得好。那你接下来打算做什么？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Good point. So what do you plan to do next?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我会去找职业顾问，帮我处理学校的申请表。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I'll visit the careers officer to help me with the school application form.

content.cn_text: 你知道，就是我们申请公司前必须提交的那个。
content.en_text: You know, the one we have to submit before applying to companies.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 但没必要填写。那只是可选的。
content.en_text: [Shona]: But it is unnecessary to fill it in. It's only optional.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 真的吗？幸好我听你说了。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Really? I'm glad I heard from you.

content.cn_text: 那么我会请职业顾问看看我的个人陈述，给我一些润色建议。
content.en_text: Then I'll ask the careers officer to look at my personal statement, and give me some tips on polishing it up.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 你不需要在简历方面寻求帮助吗？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Don't you need help with your CV?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 不用，我很好。我已经在课堂上学会怎么写了。
content.en_text: [Peter]: No, I'm good. I have already learned to write it in class.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 那很好。你选了哪种公司？
content.en_text: [Shona]: That's good. So what kind of company did you choose?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我决定申请一家IT公司。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I've decided to apply for an IT company.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 为什么？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Why is that?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 嗯，尽管我从不同的讲座中了解了IT产业过去的发展，但我对它的最新趋势一无所知。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Well, even though I've learned how the IT industry developed in the past, from different lectures, I know nothing about its latest trends.

content.cn_text: 我准备在一家IT公司工作，弥补信息上的空白。
content.en_text: I'm prepared to work in an IT company and fill in the information gap.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 我明白了。你下学期打算做什么？
content.en_text: [Shona]: I see. What do you plan to do next term?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我想我大部分选修课都会继续。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I think I'll stick to most of the optional modules I've chosen.

content.cn_text: 但至于语言课程，我日语学得很差。
content.en_text: But regarding the language sessions, I'm doing poorly in Japanese.

content.cn_text: 我最好在浪费更多时间之前放弃它。
content.en_text: I'd better drop it before wasting more time.

content.cn_text: 我想我会改学西班牙语。
content.en_text: I think I'll learn Spanish instead.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 哦，我学过一年西班牙语。我想你会觉得它很有趣。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Oh, I learned Spanish for a year. I think you'll find it interesting.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在你听对话的其余部分之前，你有一些时间查看问题26-30。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 26-30.

content.cn_text: 现在请聆听并回答问题26-30。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 26-30.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 你知道这些公司轮流提供哪些工作机会吗？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Do you know what job opportunities these companies offer in turns?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我查过网上，浏览了一些计划。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I've searched online, and browsed some of the schemes.

content.cn_text: 你认识赛克吗？
content.en_text: Do you know Saik?

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 是的，我听说他们提供实习职位，处理客户互动管理。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Yes, I heard they offer internship positions, dealing with customer interaction management.

content.cn_text: 但我不太确定那是什么意思。
content.en_text: But I'm not quite sure what that means.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 嗯，这个职位提供了全面了解客户价值的机会，
content.en_text: [Peter]: Well, the position offers the chance to become fully aware of customer value,

content.cn_text: 并与客户保持联系，让他们保持高度参与和满意。
content.en_text: and keep in touch with customers to keep them highly engaged and satisfied.

content.cn_text: 这些活动包括公关、沟通、营销和客户服务。
content.en_text: These include activities such as PR, communications, marketing, and customer service.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 听起来有很多工作要做。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Sounds like loads of work to do.

content.cn_text: 那么Gemini Technologies呢？
content.en_text: What about Gemini Technologies?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 这是一家IT咨询公司。
content.en_text: [Peter]: It's an IT consulting company.

content.cn_text: 尽管许多员工说在那里工作压力很大，但我还是想申请这家。
content.en_text: Although many employees say it's stressful working there, I want to apply for this one.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 为什么？
content.en_text: [Shona]: Why is that?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 实际上，这家公司提供改进软件架构的服务。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Actually, the company provides service to improve software architecture.

content.cn_text: 但这要求很高，因为一个软件工程师团队，
content.en_text: But that's pretty demanding, as a team of software engineers,

content.cn_text: 必须在截止日期前提供详细的分析和建议以进行必要的更改。
content.en_text: has to provide detailed analysis and suggestions for required changes before the deadline.

content.cn_text: 作为特定项目的观察者和参与者，实习生可以学习如何严格遵守截止日期工作。
content.en_text: As an observer and participant of a particular project, an intern can learn how to work to a strict deadline.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 那不是我的专业领域，但我相信你会在这方面做得很好。
content.en_text: [Shona]: That's not my area of expertise, but I'm sure you'll excel at this.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我当然希望如此。你查过德勤了吗？
content.en_text: [Peter]: I certainly do hope so. Have you checked out Deloitte?

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 当然，那是一家著名的会计师事务所。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Of course, that's a renowned accounting firm.

content.cn_text: 因此，其实习项目在这方面提供了极好的学习经验。
content.en_text: And thus, its internships offer excellent learning experiences in this regard.

content.cn_text: 你知道，比如检查公司的财务报表，
content.en_text: You know, things like examining a company's financial statements,

content.cn_text: 损益表、资产负债表和现金流量表。
content.en_text: the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement.

content.cn_text: 我想试一试，但我可能会被拒绝，所以我需要一个备用计划。
content.en_text: I want to give it a try, but I might get rejected, so I need a backup plan.

content.cn_text: 你读过关于科尔尼的资料吗？
content.en_text: Have you read anything about kerney?

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 是的，这是另一家咨询公司。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Yes, it is another consulting firm.

content.cn_text: 它提供了接触其他商业伙伴并关注人脉的机会。
content.en_text: It provides opportunities to reach out to other business partners, and pay attention to networking.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 嗯，听起来很有趣。
content.en_text: [Shona]: Well, that sounds interesting.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 我在考虑Vortex，但从它网站上没找到什么有用的信息。
content.en_text: [Peter]: I'm thinking about vortex, but I haven't got anything useful from its website.

content.cn_text: [肖娜]: 去年夏天我在那工作过。
content.en_text: [Shona]: I worked there last summer.

content.cn_text: 这是一家国际公司，总部在西班牙。
content.en_text: It's an international company, with headquarters in Spain.

content.cn_text: 所以这里的大多数经理都说西班牙语。
content.en_text: So most of the managers here speak Spanish.

content.cn_text: 多亏了实习经历，我的西班牙语变得流利了。
content.en_text: Thanks to the internship experience, I became fluent in it.

content.cn_text: [彼得]: 对。那不适合我。
content.en_text: [Peter]: Right. That's not for me.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第三部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part three.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟的时间检查第三部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers to part three.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 21–25.

items.title: What skills does Peter want to learn?

options.title: C
options.content: how to write a business proposal

options.title: C
options.content: he can communicate well with many people

items.title: What will the careers officer help Peter with?
Why did Peter choose the IT business?

options.title: A
options.content: to update his knowledge in the area

items.title: What will Peter do for the next term?

groups.desc: Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–G, next to Questions 26–30.
groups.title: Questions 26–30
